data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. GRAVITY RUSH stalked the pace from a low draw last start and fought on well to finish 10 lengths away in third (24.15) at Horsham in a T3 RSTW over 410m. Can go on with it. 7. TRIPLE THREAT box seated before sticking on well to finish 4 lengths away in third (25.99) at this track in a Maiden over 450m. Can feature again. 8. KRAKEN SANDY turned in a better effort at this track last start, finishing second behind Nera Bullet (22.80) in a Bottom Up - Maiden. Has the early speed to give a sight. The form out of the last run is proven to be strong. Hard to beat again. 6. STILL THE SAME is a last-start placegetter who should be thereabouts.","runners":[1,7,8,6],"exclusive":false}

extraMarkets.name: SHEPPARTON-R1-Fav Out
extraMarkets.message: Must finish 1st or 2nd behind N/A Runner
